chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Crl. Misc. Application No.S-335 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A No.2543/2025. 2. For orders on office objection. 3. For orders on M.A No.2544/2025. 4. For hearing of main case. 16.12.2025 Mr. Abdul Ghaffar Narejo, advocate a/w applicant. = 1 Urgency granted. 2 to 4. It is a case of the applicant that his daughter Mst. Safia has contracted marriage with respondent No.7 Jabir by exercising her right of freewill and thereafter she approached to the learned Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Umerkot for protection. Learned counsel for the applicant has filed statement alongwith order dated 13.10.2025 passed by learned Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Umerkot whereby the official respondents were directed to provide protection to Mst. Safia and her husband in accordance with law. Learned counsel for the applicant after arguing the matter at some length, does not press this application and intends to file application under section 491 Cr.P.C before concerned learned Sessions Judge. In view of above, instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application stands dismissed as not pressed alongwith listed application. JUDGE *Faisal*
